data: From the Convento del Carmine, reported by Alessi as one of several find in the years preceding 1833
I.Sicily with the permission of the Assessorato Regionale dei Beni Culturali e dell’Identità Siciliana - Dipartimento dei Beni Culturali e dell’Identità Siciliana
Partially reopened following extensive restoration work. Comprehensive collection of archaeological material, predominantly from the West of the island, with an important Etruscan collection.
Centre of Palermo, Piazza Olivella 24, 90100 - Palermo
Inscriptiones Graecae Siciliae et Italiae, additis graecis Galliae Hispaniae, Britanniae, Germaniae inscriptionibus

G. Kaibel, Inscriptiones Graecae Siciliae et Italiae, additis graecis Galliae Hispaniae, Britanniae, Germaniae inscriptionibus, Inscriptiones Graecae consilio et auctoritate Academiae Litterarum Regiae Borussicae Editae. Volumen XIV., XIV (Berlin: Georgius Reimerus, 1890)
Iscrizioni greche lapidarie del Museo di Palermo
M.T. Manni Piraino, Iscrizioni greche lapidarie del Museo di Palermo, Sikelika 6 (Palermo: S. F. Flaccovio, 1973)
Corpus inscriptionum Graecarum IV. Pars XXXIX. Inscriptiones locorum incertorum. Pars XL. Inscriptiones christianae. Indices (1877).

E. Curtius, A. Kirchhoff, and H. Roehl, Corpus inscriptionum Graecarum IV. Pars XXXIX. Inscriptiones locorum incertorum. Pars XL. Inscriptiones christianae. Indices (1877)., vol. 4, 4 vols, Königlich Preussische Akademie der Wissenschaften zu Berlin (Berlin: Ex Officina Academica, 1877)
III. Giuseppe Alessi al chiarissimo segretario dell'instituto archeologico, salute.

Giuseppe Alessi, «III. Giuseppe Alessi al chiarissimo segretario dell’instituto archeologico, salute.», Giornale di scienze, lettere e arti per la Sicilia 42, fasc. 126 (1833): 225–35, http://digitale.bnc.roma.sbn.it/tecadigitale/giornale/UFI0049392/1833/T.42/00000257
Giuseppe Alessi, «Scavi di Catania», Bullettino dell’Instituto di Corrispondenza Archeologica, fasc. 12 (1833): 172–76

Facsimile Images

Apparatus criticus

  • Text of IGPalermo but corrected against photograph; note that Kaibel followed Alessi's apograph, which does not observe the original layout. ;
  • line.5: Alessi: ΠΡΟΤΑ; Kirchoff: προτ[έρ]ᾳ; Manni Piraino: πρὸ ⟨ι⟩α’; the two numerals ι α are clearly distinguished by interpuncts and a line above, which joins the top of the iota (whence misinterpretation as Τ).

Ἐνθάδε κῖτε Ῥοδίνη ἔζησεν ἔτη εἴκοσι πέντε ἐτελεύτησεν δὲ τῇ πρὸ ια εἰδῶν Νοβεμβρίων
Text of IGPalermo but corrected against photograph; note that Kaibel followed Alessi's apograph, which does not observe the original layout. Alessi: ΠΡΟΤΑ; Kirchoff: προτ[έρ]ᾳ; Manni Piraino: πρὸ ⟨ι⟩α’; the two numerals ι α are clearly distinguished by interpuncts and a line above, which joins the top of the iota (whence misinterpretation as Τ).
